response.justification: Bogdan possesses a robust software engineering background with over 15 years of experience, demonstrating strong versatility across languages and high-throughput system design. However, the Principal Software Engineer role specifically requires deep expertise in building large-scale experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, and utilizing statistical methods for growth and measurement. Because his resume shows no relevant experience in these core domain areas, he is not a strong fit for this highly specialized position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across a diverse set of languages (C/C++, Java, JS/TS, Dlang).
Proven ability to build high-scale, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks direct experience building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems.
No demonstrated background in statistical methods, data analysis, or telemetry foundations.
Most roles have been at the Senior or Staff level in smaller organizations, with unclear alignment to an enterprise Principal (IC6) scope.
